description: Complete SDK method surface for @pushchain/core and @pushchain/ui-kit: all namespaces, method signatures, parameter types, return types, and safe_for_autonomous_execution flags. For intent-level capability definitions (what an agent can do) see capabilities.json. For routing logic see decision-tree.json and task-router.md.

namespaces.description: Root SDK namespace for initialization and constants

methods.name: initialize
methods.signature: PushChain.initialize(signer: UniversalSigner | UniversalAccount, options: { network: PUSH_NETWORK, rpcUrls?, blockExplorers?, printTraces?, progressHook? }): Promise<PushChainClient>
methods.description: Initializes SDK client with universal signer or read-only account

namespaces.description: All constant values for networks, chains, libraries, and tokens

methods.name: PUSH_NETWORK
methods.description: Network constants: TESTNET (latest testnet), TESTNET_DONUT (Donut testnet), MAINNET, LOCALNET

methods.name: CHAIN
methods.description: Chain identifiers in CAIP-2 format

methods.name: LIBRARY
methods.description: Supported signer library constants

methods.name: MOVEABLE.TOKEN
methods.description: Supported tokens for cross-chain asset movement

methods.name: PAYABLE.TOKEN
methods.description: Supported tokens for paying gas fees via tx.payGasWith

namespaces.description: Solana (SVM) escape-hatch utilities for manual Anchor IDL registration. Only needed when building tx.data manually with raw Anchor discriminator + Borsh bytes — normal callers use encodeTxData({ idl, ... }) which auto-registers.

methods.name: registerIdl
methods.description: Manually registers an Anchor IDL for a given Solana program ID. Required only when constructing raw SVM tx data without encodeTxData.

methods.name: getRegisteredIdls
methods.description: Returns all currently registered Anchor IDLs keyed by program ID.

namespaces.description: Universal signer creation and conversion utilities

methods.name: toUniversal
methods.description: Converts EVM signer or skeleton to universal signer

methods.name: toUniversalFromKeypair
methods.signature: PushChain.utils.signer.toUniversalFromKeypair(keypair: Keypair, options: { chain: CHAIN, library: LIBRARY }): Promise<UniversalSigner>
methods.description: Converts non-EVM keypair (e.g., Solana) to universal signer

methods.name: construct
methods.signature: PushChain.utils.signer.construct(account: UniversalAccount, options: { signAndSendTransaction, signMessage, signTypedData }): UniversalSignerSkeleton
methods.description: Constructs custom signer skeleton with manual signing implementations

methods.name: toUniversal
methods.description: Converts address to UniversalAccount with chain context

methods.name: toChainAgnostic
methods.description: Produces a fully-qualified CAIP-10 chain-agnostic address string, e.g. 'eip155:11155111:0xAbc...'

methods.name: fromChainAgnostic
methods.description: Parses a CAIP-10 chain-agnostic address string back into a UniversalAccount

methods.name: deriveExecutorAccount
methods.signature: PushChain.utils.account.deriveExecutorAccount(uoa: UniversalAccount, options: { chain: CHAIN; skipNetworkCheck?: boolean }): Promise<{ address: string }>
methods.description: Derives the Chain Executor Account (CEA) address for a given UOA on a specific external chain. Use skipNetworkCheck:true for chains not yet live.

methods.name: resolveControllerAccount
methods.signature: PushChain.utils.account.resolveControllerAccount(account: string, options?: { chain?: CHAIN; skipNetworkCheck?: boolean }): Promise<{ accounts: Array<{ chain, chainName, address, type, exists, role? }> }>
methods.description: Recursively resolves the controller identity chain behind any executor address. UEA → UOA; CEA → Push account → UOA. type: 'uea' | 'uoa' | 'cea'. role: 'controller' marks the root controlling account. Pass options.chain for CEA resolution. Complement of deriveExecutorAccount (forward: UOA→executor; this: executor→UOA).
methods.returns: Promise<{ accounts: Array<{ chain, chainName, address, type, exists, role? }> }>

methods.name: convertExecutorToOriginAccount
methods.description: Reverse-maps a UEA (Push Chain execution account) to its origin wallet. Pass options.chain to treat as CEA from a specific chain.

methods.name: convertOriginToExecutor
methods.signature: PushChain.utils.account.convertOriginToExecutor(account: UniversalAccount, options?: { onlyCompute?: boolean }): Promise<{ address: string, isDeployed: boolean }>
methods.description: Maps an origin UniversalAccount to its executor account (UEA) address on Push Chain. Use onlyCompute:true to get address without deployment check.

namespaces.description: Common utility functions for data formatting and encoding

methods.name: parseUnits
methods.signature: PushChain.utils.helpers.parseUnits(value: string, decimals: number | { decimals: number }): bigint
methods.description: Parses decimal string to smallest unit bigint. Accepts decimals as a number (e.g., 18) or object (e.g., { decimals: 18 })

methods.name: formatUnits
methods.signature: PushChain.utils.helpers.formatUnits(value: string | bigint, decimals: number | { decimals: number, precision?: number }): string
methods.description: Converts smallest unit value back to human-readable string. Inverse of parseUnits.

methods.name: encodeTxData
methods.signature: PushChain.utils.helpers.encodeTxData({ abi: AbiFragment[], functionName: string, args?: any[] }): string
methods.description: ABI-encodes a contract function call into hex calldata

namespaces.description: Chain metadata utilities for querying supported chains and identifiers

methods.name: getSupportedChains
methods.description: Returns array of CAIP-2 chain identifiers supported on the given network

methods.name: getSupportedChainsByName
methods.description: Returns human-readable chain name strings supported on the given network, e.g. ['PUSH_TESTNET_DONUT', 'ETHEREUM_SEPOLIA']

methods.name: getChainName
methods.description: Returns human-readable chain name from a CAIP-2 chain identifier

methods.name: getChainNamespace
methods.description: Returns the namespace portion of a CAIP-2 chain identifier (e.g., 'eip155' or 'solana')

namespaces.description: Token utilities for querying moveable and payable tokens per chain

methods.name: getMoveableTokens
methods.description: Returns list of tokens that can be moved cross-chain via tx.funds for a given origin chain

methods.name: getPayableTokens
methods.description: Returns list of tokens accepted for gas fee payment via tx.payGasWith for a given origin chain

methods.name: getPRC20Address
methods.signature: PushChain.utils.tokens.getPRC20Address(token: MoveableToken | { chain: CHAIN, address: string }, options?: { network?: PUSH_NETWORK }): { address: `0x${string}`; chain: CHAIN; symbol: string; decimals: number; network: PUSH_NETWORK }
methods.description: Returns the full PRC20 token descriptor on Push Chain corresponding to a moveable token (address, chain, symbol, decimals, network)
methods.returns: { address: `0x${string}`; chain: CHAIN; symbol: string; decimals: number; network: PUSH_NETWORK }

namespaces.description: Conversion utilities for slippage and amount calculations

methods.name: slippageToMinAmount
methods.description: Calculates minimum acceptable output amount after applying slippage. slippageBps: 100 = 1%, 50 = 0.5%. Use result as tx.payGasWith.minAmountOut.

methods.name: getAccountStatus
methods.description: Returns UEA deployment status, version, and upgrade requirements

methods.name: upgradeAccount
methods.description: Upgrades UEA to latest required version (gasless signature operation)

methods.name: reinitialize
methods.description: Creates new client with different signer/account or updated config

methods.name: origin
methods.description: Getter for origin account (source chain wallet identity)

methods.name: account
methods.description: Getter for execution account (UEA on Push Chain)

methods.name: sendTransaction
methods.signature: pushChainClient.universal.sendTransaction(tx: { to, from?, value?, data?, funds?, progressHook?, gasLimit?, maxFeePerGas?, maxPriorityFeePerGas?, payGasWith?, deadline? }): Promise<UniversalTxResponse>
methods.description: Sends universal transaction. Advanced args: gasLimit/maxFeePerGas/maxPriorityFeePerGas override gas; payGasWith pays fees in supported token; deadline sets execution expiry. Solana targets use encodeTxData({ idl, functionName, args }) passed as tx.data — there is no svmExecute field.

methods.name: prepareTransaction
methods.signature: pushChainClient.universal.prepareTransaction(tx: { to, from?, value?, data?, funds?, gasLimit?, maxFeePerGas?, maxPriorityFeePerGas?, payGasWith?, deadline? }): Promise<PreparedUniversalTx>
methods.description: Prepares a transaction without executing it. Returns PreparedUniversalTx with route, estimatedGas, nonce, deadline, payload. Pass result to executeTransactions for multi-hop cascades.

methods.name: executeTransactions
methods.description: Executes ordered array of prepared transactions as a single-signature multi-hop cascade. Returns CascadedTxResponse with initialTxHash, hops[], hopCount, wait(opts?), waitForAll(opts?).

methods.name: trackTransaction
methods.signature: pushChainClient.universal.trackTransaction(txHash: string, options?: { chain?: CHAIN, progressHook?: (event: ProgressEvent) => void, waitForCompletion?: boolean, advanced?: { pollingIntervalMs?: number, timeout?: number, rpcUrls?: Partial<Record<CHAIN, string[]>> } }): Promise<UniversalTxResponse>
methods.description: Resumes tracking any universal transaction by hash and origin chain. Works independently of sendTransaction — pass any stored hash. Defaults chain to PUSH_TESTNET_DONUT. Set waitForCompletion:false for a snapshot status check without waiting.

arguments.name: txHash
arguments.description: Transaction hash on the origin chain

arguments.name: options.progressHook
arguments.description: Callback invoked at each tracking step

arguments.name: options.waitForCompletion
arguments.description: true = poll until confirmed (default), false = return current status snapshot

arguments.name: options.advanced.timeout
arguments.description: Max wait in ms before timeout (default 60000)

arguments.name: options.advanced.rpcUrls
arguments.description: Custom RPC URLs for status queries

methods.name: signMessage
methods.description: Signs arbitrary message bytes

methods.name: signTypedData
methods.description: Signs EIP-712 typed data

methods.name: getTransactionUrl
methods.description: Returns a block explorer URL for the given transaction hash. Defaults to the Push Chain explorer; pass options.chain to get the URL on a specific external chain instead.

methods.name: listUrls
methods.signature: pushChainClient.explorer.listUrls(options?: { chain?: CHAIN }): { explorers: Array<{ chain: string; chainName: string; urls: string[] }> }
methods.description: Lists configured block explorer URLs. Defaults to client's origin chain; pass options.chain to list explorers for a specific chain.
methods.returns: { explorers: Array<{ chain: string; chainName: string; urls: string[] }> }

methods.name: listAllUrls
methods.signature: pushChainClient.explorer.listAllUrls(): { explorers: Array<{ chain: string; chainName: string; urls: string[] }> }
methods.description: Lists block explorer URLs for ALL supported chains at once. Useful for building explorer link pickers or cross-chain dashboards.
methods.returns: { explorers: Array<{ chain: string; chainName: string; urls: string[] }> }

namespaces.description: Conversion quote utilities for cross-chain token swaps

methods.name: getConversionQuote
methods.signature: pushChainClient.funds.getConversionQuote(amountIn: bigint, options: { from: PayableToken, to: MoveableToken }): Promise<ConversionQuote>
methods.description: Returns a conversion quote for swapping one token to another. from = payable token (what you pay with), to = moveable token (what you move). Returns amountIn, amountOut, rate, route, timestamp.
methods.returns: Promise<{ amountIn: string, amountOut: string, rate: number, route?: string[], timestamp: number }>

namespaces.description: Internal orchestration layer (typically not called directly)

methods.name: orchestrator
methods.description: Handles RPC resolution, UEA management, and gas orchestration internally (internal use)

ui_kit_exports.description: React components and hooks for wallet integration. Bundles @pushchain/core — no separate install needed. Use usePushChainClient() to access PushChainClient and call sendTransaction, signMessage, prepareTransaction, executeTransactions directly from React.

exports.name: PushUniversalWalletProvider
exports.description: React context provider for wallet state management

exports.name: usePushWalletContext
exports.description: Access wallet connection status and actions

exports.name: usePushChainClient
exports.description: Returns the initialized PushChainClient (from @pushchain/core) after wallet connection. Exposes all core transaction methods: sendTransaction, signMessage, prepareTransaction, executeTransactions. This is the primary way to execute universal transactions in a React app.

exports.name: usePushChain
exports.description: Combined hook for Push Chain state and actions

exports.name: PushUI.CONSTANTS
exports.description: UI Kit constants including PUSH_NETWORK and CONNECTION.STATUS
